# Seranex Lanka

> Seranex Lanka is a custom software company in Sri Lanka building intelligent software and AI Digital Staff that remove operational bottlenecks, reduce errors, and help teams work with more clarity.

## About Us
We are the best web design company in Sri Lanka, offering end-to-end website solutions, custom software development, and AI integration services.

## Services
- Custom Software Development
- AI Digital Staff & Automation
- Web Design & Development
- eCommerce Platforms
- Digital Marketing & SEO

## Contact
- Email: info@seranex.lk
- Phone/WhatsApp: +94 72 838 2638
- Location: No. 20 A, Amuna Rd, Seeduwa, Sri Lanka
- Website: https://seranex.lk
